---
title: "Noelle Broughton, PhD"
subtitle: "Housing Policy and Administration Researcher"
---

*Studying how bureaucratic privatization decisions undermine housing justice.*

[CV](#) · [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=KcgSSwcAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao) · [GitHub](https://github.com/noelle-broughton)

**Incoming Postdoctoral Researcher** // Glenn College of Public Affairs & The Kirwin Institute, *The Ohio State University*

**PhD Candidate** // School of Public Affairs and Administration, *University of Kansas*

## Contact

noellebroughton@ku.edu
